# M5Cardputer Loader partition table (E: #  factory : the LOADER firmware (this project). Always the boot fallback.
#  ota_0   : the "runtime slot". Selected firmware is copied here and run.
#  spiffs  : small scratch FS (loader settings backup
#    Update.writeStream() streams the SD .bin into ota_0
#    Update.end(true)     sets ota_0 as the boot partition -> reboot.
#    - rollback build: app never marks itself valid -> reset rolls back to factory
#    - normal build  : app includes include/loader_return.h and calls returnToLoader()
#  ota_0 is 6MB so it fits large apps (DOOM
